# CMHC Multi-Family — The Definitive Guide to Canadian Multifamily Financing

> The complete, current-to-April-2026 resource for CMHC multi-unit (5+ unit) residential financing in Canada. Covers MLI Standard, MLI Select, the Apartment Construction Loan Program (ACLP), the Affordable Housing Fund (AHF), the Co-operative Housing Development Program (CHDP), and specialized segments (retirement, student, supportive, SRO). Includes underwriting logic (DCR, LTV/LTC, NOI build, opex benchmarks), full calculator suite, provincial overlays, and the lender landscape.

All content is independent editorial reference material, maintained current to April 2026 and incorporating the July 14 2025 premium overhaul and the November 2025 MLI Select refresh.

## Programs
- [MLI Standard](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/mli-standard.astro): Foundational CMHC multi-unit product. Up to 85% LTV, no affordability commitment.
- [MLI Select](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/mli-select): Points-based flagship. 50+ pts required, up to 95% LTC, 50-year amortization, up to 30% premium discount.
- [ACLP — Apartment Construction Loan Program](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/aclp): $55B direct-lending program at below-market fixed rates, 100% of residential cost.
- [AHF — Affordable Housing Fund](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/ahf): $14.6B low-interest/forgivable loans for non-profit, government, and Indigenous borrowers.
- [CHDP — Co-operative Housing Development Program](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/chdp): $1.5B. Co-op only. Repayable + forgivable to 100% of eligible costs.
- [Specialized](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/specialized): Retirement, student, supportive, SRO.
- [Multi-Go](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/multi-go): Simplified product for 5–19 unit acquisitions.
- [Program comparison](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/compare): Side-by-side of all five programs.
- [Application process](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/application-process): Step-by-step from inquiry through funding.
- [Construction paths](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/construction-paths): Construction → takeout financing options.
- [Amortization options](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/amortization-options): 25/30/40/50-year options by program.
- [Rental achievement](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/rental-achievement): Hold-back and release mechanics.

## MLI Select deep dive
- [MLI Select overview](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/programs/mli-select): Points structure, tiers, benefits scaling.

## Underwriting
- [Underwriting hub](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting): Index of underwriting topics.
- [DCR — Debt coverage ratio](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/dcr): Minimum DCR tables by segment, stress-test logic.
- [LTV and LTC](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/ltv): Loan-to-value vs loan-to-cost, which binds and when.
- [Affordability definitions](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/affordability): MFI, LEM, MRM, and how commitments are measured.
- [Affordability methodology](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/affordability-methodology): How CMHC calculates affordability thresholds.
- [NOI methodology](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/noi-methodology): How CMHC builds NOI for sizing.
- [Opex benchmarks](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/opex): Per-unit and percentage-of-EGI benchmarks.
- [Opex categories](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/opex-categories): Line-by-line opex definitions.
- [Vacancy assumptions](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/vacancy): Underwriting vacancy vs market vacancy.
- [Rental market survey](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/rental-market-survey): CMHC RMS mechanics and use in underwriting.
- [Appraisal requirements](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/appraisal): Appraisal scope, AACI requirements.
- [Environmental requirements](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/environmental): Phase I/II ESA expectations.
- [Cash reserves](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/cash-reserves): Replacement and interest reserves.
- [Seasoning](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/seasoning): Ownership seasoning and rent-roll seasoning.
- [Documentation](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/documentation): Full package requirements by program.
- [Common conditions](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/underwriting/common-conditions): Typical approval conditions.

## Eligibility
- [Eligibility hub](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/eligibility): Index.
- [Borrower eligibility](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/eligibility/borrower): Net-worth, liquidity, credit, experience.
- [Property eligibility](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/eligibility/property): Asset class, unit count, condition.
- [Lender eligibility](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/eligibility/lender): Which lenders originate CMHC multi-unit and who specializes.

## Lifecycle
- [Lifecycle hub](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/lifecycle): Index.
- [Renewal](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/lifecycle/renewal): Renewal mechanics, premium treatment, term options.
- [Assumption](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/lifecycle/assumption): Assumption rules and affordability-commitment transfer.
- [Porting](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/lifecycle/porting): Porting insurance to a new property.
- [Prepayment](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/lifecycle/prepayment): Prepayment privileges, penalties, IRD.

## Calculators
- [All calculators](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators): Index of 20+ calculators.
- [Loan sizer](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/loan-sizer): DCR, LTV/LTC, program cap — flags binding constraint.
- [MLI Select point scorer](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/point-scorer): Score affordability + energy + accessibility.
- [Point optimizer](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/point-optimizer): Lowest-cost path to 50/70/100 points.
- [Premium calculator](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/premium): Base + surcharges + MLI Select discount.
- [Premium credit](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/premium-credit): Credit mechanics on renewal and top-up.
- [PST on premium](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/pst-premium): Province-by-province PST on insurance premium.
- [DSCR inverse](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/dscr-inverse): Back-solve max loan from NOI.
- [Cash flow](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/cash-flow): Unlevered + levered cash flow.
- [Cash-on-cash](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/cash-on-cash): Year-1 yield on equity.
- [NOI + cap rate](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/noi-cap-rate): Value by cap rate.
- [Break-even occupancy](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/break-even-occupancy): Occupancy floor to service debt.
- [Stress test](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/stress-test): Rate + vacancy shock.
- [Rent gap](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/rent-gap): Market vs in-place rent.
- [Amortization schedule](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/amortization-schedule): Full schedule with interest/principal split.
- [Equity takeout](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/equity-takeout): Refi proceeds after premium + fees.
- [Purchase vs refi](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/purchase-vs-refi): Structure comparison.
- [Conventional vs CMHC](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/conventional-vs-cmhc): Insured vs conventional all-in cost.
- [Construction draws](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/construction-draws): Draw schedule + interest reserve.
- [Grant stacking](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/grant-stacking): Federal + provincial + municipal stacking.
- [Renewal analyzer](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/renewal-analyzer): Payment shock at renewal.
- [Affordability sizer](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/affordability-sizer): Max rent at a given affordability commitment.
- [Compare scenarios](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/calculators/compare): Side-by-side deal scenarios.

## Tools
- [Tools hub](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools): Index.
- [Program matcher](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/program-matcher): Short questionnaire → best-fit program.
- [Eligibility tree](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/eligibility-tree): Decision tree for program eligibility.
- [Lender matrix](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/lender-matrix): Active CMHC multi-unit lenders by program and region.
- [MLI comparison](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/mli-comparison): Standard vs Select side-by-side.
- [Timeline tracker](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/timeline-tracker): Typical days-to-funding by program.
- [Document checklist](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/doc-checklist): Full submission checklist by program.
- [Fee schedule](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/fee-schedule): CMHC fees and third-party cost benchmarks.
- [Rental achievement tool](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/rental-achievement): Hold-back release modelling.
- [Certificate of Insurance expiry](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/tools/coi-expiry): COI validity and extension rules.

## Provinces
- [Provinces hub](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/provinces): Rent control, new-build exemptions, municipal stacking by province.
- [Ontario](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/provinces/ontario)
- [British Columbia](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/provinces/british-columbia)
- [Alberta](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/provinces/alberta)
- [Quebec](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/provinces/quebec)

## Reference
- [FAQ](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/faq): Program selection, underwriting, premium, process, policy, lifecycle.
- [Glossary](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/glossary): CMHC terminology A–Z.
- [Data hub](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/data): Premium tables, opex benchmarks, DCR minimums.
- [Timeline](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/timeline): Typical days-to-funding.
- [Policy timeline](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/policy): Material CMHC policy changes June 2024 – March 2026.
- [Lenders](https://cmhc-multi-family.pages.dev/lenders): Active lender roster.
